classes.Drug: A pharmacological substance used for treatment or prevention of disease
classes.Condition: A medical disease, disorder, syndrome or diagnosis
classes.Procedure: A medical intervention, surgery or therapeutic procedure
classes.Symptom: A subjective manifestation of disease reported by patient
classes.AnatomicalStructure: A body part, organ or tissue
classes.DosageRegimen: A specific dosing schedule or treatment protocol
classes.LabTest: A laboratory or diagnostic test or measurement
classes.Organization: A medical institution, company or regulatory body
classes.Other: Does not fit any of the above categories

treats.description: Drug is used to treat Condition

causes.description: Drug causes Symptom as side effect

part_of.description: AnatomicalStructure is part of another AnatomicalStructure

related_to.description: Generic relation between any two entities

axioms.description: Subject of predicate must match predicate domain type
Object of predicate must match predicate range type
Every entity must have a type from the class set C
Every predicate must be from the property set P
No entity may be related to itself
